entries.prompt: A circular zodiac mandala for Aries, centered on a ram's head with curved horns, surrounded by radiating fire symbols and Mars planetary symbols, fine detailed adult line art. Black and white line drawing. Clean outlines on pure white background. Intricate detailed patterns, fine lines. No shading, no text.
